description:
**Milestone:** Google Calendar Integration

Add Google Calendar connection UI to project settings.

1. **apps/ui/src/components/views/project-settings/**: Find the integrations section (likely near Linear integration settings). Add a 'Google Calendar' integration card with:
   - When disconnected: 'Connect Google Calendar' button that opens the OAuth flow (redirect to /api/google-calendar/authorize with projectPath)
   - When connected: shows connected email, 'Disconnect' button, optional 'Calendar ID' field to select a specific calendar (default: primary)
   - Status fetched via `POST /api/google-calendar/status`

2. **apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-view.tsx**: Show a subtle 'Connect Google Calendar' nudge in the calendar header if not connected (dismissible, stored in localStorage).

Follow the exact same UI pattern as the Linear integration card in project settings.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/project-settings/
- apps/ui/src/components/views/calendar-view/calendar-view.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Google Calendar section appears in project settings
- [ ] Connect button initiates OAuth flow
- [ ] Connected state shows user email and disconnect option
- [ ] Calendar view shows nudge to connect Google Calendar when not connected
- [ ] Disconnecting clears Google events from calendar view

**Complexity:** medium
